fields.label: Bible Book
fields.options:
### **Old Testament (39 Books)**

2. Exodus
3. Leviticus
4. Numbers
5. Deuteronomy

12. 2 Kings

14. 2 Chronicles
15. Ezra
16. Nehemiah
17. Esther
#### **Wisdom & Poetry**
18. Job

20. Proverbs
21. Ecclesiastes
22. Song of Solomon
#### **Major Prophets**

26. Ezekiel
27. Daniel
